data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Services are independently deployable and use APIs to communicate.

data.title: Horizontal Scaling
data.description: The site infrastructure supports horizontal scaling to manage its large user base.
data.technical_spec: Uses load balancers and multiple instances to distribute traffic.

data.title: Data Management
data.description: Efficient data handling using distributed databases.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes technologies like Cassandra and PostgreSQL for data storage.

data.title: Global Content Delivery
data.description: Utilizes CDNs to ensure fast content delivery worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Integration with CDNs like Akamai to minimize latency.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.technical_spec: Employs message brokers like Kafka for event streaming.
